steps.title: Identify the growth factor
steps.content:
The function is
$$f(t)=64{,}000(2)^{\frac{t}{600}}$$
The population doubles when the factor $2$ is applied once.

steps.title: Set the exponent to one
steps.content:
Set the exponent on $2$ equal to $1$.
$$\frac{t}{600}=1$$
$$t=600$$
The answer is 600.
